# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch snapshot configuration

# Configure snapshot repository
repositories:
  - type: s3
    name: s3-repository
    settings:
      bucket: your-s3-bucket-name
      region: your-s3-region

# Schedule snapshot creation
cron:
  minute: "0 0 * * *"

# Define snapshot configurations
snapshots:
  - name: daily-snapshot
    indices: '*'
    repository: s3-repository

# Restore a snapshot
restore:
  snapshot: daily-snapshot
  indices: '*'
  repository: s3-repository
